name: Aberdeen Group Market Analysis and Positioning Services for Business Technology — Corporate Presentation
description: Full Aberdeen Group corporate presentation (22 slides) covering the firm's mission, competitive context, service portfolio, and engagement model. Documents Aberdeen's core competencies (market research, industry dialogue, technology-in-business-context, vision, actionable strategies), service offerings (AAS, RAMP, Profiles, webcasts, marketing workshops), and technology coverage taxonomy. Primary sales/marketing tool for technology supplier prospects.
